title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.110 - Bond of clerk — deposited, recorded (fourth class counties)
text:
59.110.  Bond of clerk — deposited, recorded (fourth class counties). — Such bonds shall be deposited in the office of the secretary of state, and by him recorded.
(RSMo 1939 § 13151) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11530; 1919 § 10555; 1909 § 10368
